evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent: boto3 S3 client with endpoint_url, signature_version=s3v4, ClientMethod='put_object' with Bucket/Key/ContentType params, ExpiresIn — all standard and self-consistent. No version stamp but pattern is well-established.
evidence.executability: Code is split across multiple fenced blocks referencing each other via `from .config import app, s3_client, settings` which doesn't match a single extractable file. Pydantic v1 style BaseSettings import (`from pydantic import BaseSettings`) is broken in pydantic 2.7 (pinned in requirements) — needs pydantic-settings. UploadURLResponse referenced before defined module-wise. Multiple non-trivial fixes needed.
evidence.completeness: (a) R2 token acquisition described with menu path; (b) pip install via requirements.txt but no explicit `pip install -r requirements.txt` bash block, npm install present; (c) .env template with exact names matches code; (d) backend code present but fragmented; (e) React component present; (f) no explicit Test section with runnable command — only narrative about pytest/curl. Missing runnable test command.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Numeric citations [1][6][9] etc. throughout but no actual URLs given. No canonical docs URLs (developers.cloudflare.com/r2, boto3 docs) are present as links. Citations function as placeholders only.

rubric_notes: Very long, repetitive narrative. Code blocks reference cross-module imports that the deterministic extractor cannot resolve into a single runnable file. Pydantic BaseSettings import is broken with pinned pydantic==2.7.0.
